content.en:
The Golden Crow Palace Lord had always known that Black Wind Mountain was not simple, but he never expected that Black Wind Mountain was so deeply hidden, and there was a half-step domain ancestor like the Miaofa Dao Ancestor.

At the beginning of the Domain Boundary Shattering Battle, Black Wind Mountain did send a lot of half-step Domain Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors to participate in the battle, but the battlefield of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the battlefield of Black Wind Mountain were not together, and the battle situation was too tragic at that time, how could he have time to spy on the strength of Black Wind Mountain!

Moreover, after the Domain Boundary was shattered, the Vast Sea Ancestor threw one-third of the Domain Boundary Fragments into the Dark Forbidden Domain, and he didn't even have time to explain much, only asking the Heavenly Emperor Palace to be careful with the Black Wind Mountain, lest the Black Wind Mountain destroy the plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Now, he finally knew the meaning of the words of the Vast Sea Ancestor, and it was not simple to say that the Black Wind Mountain.

Perhaps a half-step domain ancestor like the Miaofa Dao Ancestor was not necessarily the strongest in the Black Wind Mountain, and even had a stronger existence.

Of course.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace naturally also has hidden powers, otherwise the Heavenly Emperor Palace would not be worthy of being called a legendary-level force.

Bang!!!!

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor fought, and the battle between the two sides had almost surpassed the scope of the ordinary half-step domain ancestor, and the terrifying aftermath made many Dao Ancestors retreat into the distance, not daring to approach this area.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord's physical body entered the realm of all things, and his physical body was almost invincible, both in strength and defense, far beyond the ordinary half-step domain ancestor, and his forbidden body had also reached the level of ninety percent three, which was much more terrifying than the ninety percent forbidden body of the Qinglong Palace Lord.

And the Forbidden Dao Ancestor of the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor is too strong, blessed on the forbidden weapon, a random blow is comparable to a small level of forbidden Dao Technique, and the destructive power is terrifying, it can break through the body of the Golden Crow Palace Lord's Ten Thousand Realms, of course, it is only slightly injured him, and there is no way to give the Golden Crow Palace Lord too many injuries.

And the Miaofa Dao Ancestor didn't dare to fight with the Golden Crow Palace Lord in close combat, after all, her physical body was much weaker, and she hadn't reached the realm of all things yet.

The two fought for a long time, but they didn't tell the winner.

Abrupt.

The two stopped fighting and separated far from each other.

"Miao Fa Dao Ancestor, let's divide the body of this forbidden creature equally, how about it?" the Golden Crow Palace Lord proposed.

"Yes!"

Miaofa Dao Ancestor agreed.

Now, Black Wind Mountain doesn't want to start a war with the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the value of the corpse of the forbidden creature is indeed very high, but there is no need to fight to the death, it is not worth it.

"Yes, yes, yes, everyone shares it together, how good!"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Migu Dao Ancestor, and Tianfan Dao Ancestor spoke.

Miaofa Dao Ancestor sneered: "The equal division means that our Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace are equally divided, and you three Nine Heavens forces are not qualified to divide equally!"

"Get out!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord also snorted coldly at the Zhenyu Dao Ancestors.

He was afraid of the Black Wind Mountain, but he didn't take the Tianhai Sect, the Mitian Sect and the Ten Thousand Domains Temple in his eyes at all, these three major forces were just three half-step domain ancestors, if there was hidden strength, at most one more half-step domain ancestor would not be a threat at all.

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Migu Dao Ancestor, and Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor regretted it, if they had known, they would have cooperated with Black Wind Mountain, so that they could obtain a part of the corpse of the forbidden creature.

But they didn't expect that Black Wind Mountain would be so strong, the Golden Crow Palace Masters had all come out, and Black Wind Mountain actually had a half-step domain ancestor who could stop the Golden Crow Palace Lord.

If Black Wind Mountain had revealed their hole cards earlier, why would they refuse!

But it's too late to regret it, the three of Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Migu Dao Ancestor, and Tianfan Dao Ancestor didn't dare to offend the Golden Crow Palace Lord and Miaofa Dao Ancestor, so they could only retreat one by one, and anger these two half-step domain ancestors for free, then they would die.

Subsequently.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor teamed up to cut the scales of the Darkwing Roc Eagle.

The strength of the Golden Crow Palace Lord is strong, but it is equal to the power of a fist, the attack power is enough, but there is no cutting power, and the attack power of the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor is equivalent to a sharp blade, even if it does not use a lot of strength, it can also cut items.

Therefore, with the help of the Miaofa Dao Ancestor, the first scale was soon cut off.

"This scale belongs to our Black Wind Mountain first!"

Miaofa Dao Ancestor spoke.

"Yes!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord agreed.

Immediately, the Eternal Dao Ancestors took over this piece of Darkwing Dapeng Eagle Scale, and then began to deal with the taboo rules on this scale, otherwise there would be no way to incorporate it into the body world, and it would be difficult to take it away.

Soon, the Eternal Dao Ancestor finished processing and easily collected this piece of scale.

As time passed, the scales on the surface of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle were cut and stripped off piece by piece, becoming the collections of the Heavenly Emperor's Palace and Black Wind Mountain.

There were a total of 10,024 scales on the body surface of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, and after a long time of cutting and deprivation, they were finally all removed, and the Black Wind Mountain obtained 5,012 scales, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace also obtained 5,012 scales.

In addition to the scales, the blood, flesh, and bones of the Darkwing Roc Eagle are supreme treasures.

Ye Tian was very moved to see it, but it was a pity that he was now the strongest Dao Ancestor, and he was not qualified to share the scales, blood, bones and other treasures of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle from the hands of the Golden Crow Palace Lord, the Miaofa Dao Ancestor and other half-step domain ancestors.

Ouyang Jiu'er on the side was also very envious, although she was also a half-step domain ancestor in her previous life, and she had seen a lot of good things, she had never obtained the corpse of a forbidden creature!

Before, she regarded a drop of Tai Ou's blood as a treasure, and how much blood did this forbidden creature's corpse have!

It's incomparable!

However, even if she regained the strength of her previous life, she would not be able to defeat the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor, after all, she had only become a half-step domain ancestor by luck in her previous life, not a powerful half-step domain ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, three months have passed.

The entire body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle was almost divided between the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the two major forces also used time to speed up the processing of scales, blood, bones and other components in a timely manner, and included them in the body world of each half-step domain ancestor one by one.

Suddenly.

Click!

This was the sound of the world shattering, and with the disappearance of the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, the five worlds in its body naturally collapsed, and pieces of world fragments fell in this area.

Many ordinary things disintegrate directly as soon as they enter the dark forbidden realm, and things that don't disintegrate are good things.

The Half-Step Domain Ancestor couldn't look down on some things, but the other Dao Ancestors could see it, especially those Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors and Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who had not entered the body world of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, and they rushed up one by one to snatch those treasures.

The half-step domain ancestors were eyeing the Eternal Source Stone Statue, after all, with the collapse of the Golden World, that Eternal Source Stone Statue would definitely be taken away.

This is also the reason why the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain must cut the corpse of the forbidden creature, after all, there is no way to take away the Eternal Source Stone Statue without cutting it.

Abrupt!

The Eternal Source Stone Statue appeared, and the strong Forbidden Dao fluctuations attracted the attention of all the half-step domain ancestors, one by one full of greed.

"Take!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor made the first move.
